summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-CLEAN V2 public booking page and calendar authentication. All 19 backend API tests passed. Full 4-step booking flow tested successfully via Playwright. Calendar page correctly requires authentication.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/bookings/public-locations - returns 200
Backend: GET /api/bookings/public-locations - returns array with Budapest and Debrecen
Backend: GET /api/bookings/public-services - returns 200 with array of services
Backend: GET /api/bookings/public-services - services have service_id, name, price, duration
Backend: GET /api/bookings/available-slots - returns 200 with time slots
Backend: GET /api/bookings/available-slots - slots have time_slot and available_workers
Backend: GET /api/bookings/available-slots - workers have worker_id and name
Backend: POST /api/bookings - creates booking successfully (200)
Backend: POST /api/bookings - returns booking_id, customer_name, plate_number, status='foglalt'
Backend: POST /api/bookings - supports optional fields (notes, address, invoice data)
Backend: POST /api/bookings - invalid service_id returns 404
Backend: POST /api/bookings - missing required fields returns 422
Backend: GET /api/bookings requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/bookings/{id} requires authentication (401)
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} requires authentication (401)
Backend: DELETE /api/bookings/{id} requires authentication (401)
Frontend: /booking page loads without authentication (public)
Frontend: Step 1 - Location dropdown and services list visible
Frontend: Step 1 - Can select Budapest location
Frontend: Step 1 - Can select service from list
Frontend: Step 2 - Date picker and time slots visible
Frontend: Step 2 - Time slots load after selecting date
Frontend: Step 2 - Worker dropdown visible (optional)
Frontend: Step 3 - Personal data form (name, car_type, plate, email, phone)
Frontend: Step 3 - Invoice fields toggle works
Frontend: Step 4 - Summary shows all booking details
Frontend: Step 4 - Submit button creates booking
Frontend: Confirmation screen shows 'Foglalás sikeres!' with booking details
Frontend: Confirmation screen shows 'Új foglalás' button
Frontend: /calendar redirects to /login (requires authentication)
Frontend: Login page shows 'Bejelentkezés Google fiókkal' button
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created during testing with unique plate numbers (TEST-xxxx pattern)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested the new public booking page (/booking) with 4-step wizard: 1) Location & Service selection, 2) Date & Time slot selection with available workers, 3) Personal data form (name, car_type, plate_number, email, phone + optional invoice fields), 4) Summary & Submit. Booking confirmation screen shows success message with booking details. Calendar page (/calendar) correctly requires authentication and redirects to /login. All public booking APIs work without authentication: /api/bookings/public-locations, /api/bookings/public-services, /api/bookings/available-slots, POST /api/bookings. Authenticated endpoints (GET/PUT/DELETE /api/bookings) correctly return 401.
